notes: Android uses a locally provisioned Stockfish 18 arm64 executable extracted from the app package, while iOS links a locally provisioned static bridge library that exports nitechess_stockfish_request_bestmove_utf8 / nitechess_stockfish_free_utf8. These large runtime payloads are intentionally gitignored so the repo stays pushable without Git LFS; Android x86_64 emulator payloads are still not provisioned here.
